title: galium mollugo subsp. marmaricum
intro: Galium mollugo subsp. marmaricum is a subspecies of the Galium mollugo plant, a perennial herb belonging to the bedstraw family, native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Galium mollugo subsp. marmaricum include treating urinary tract issues, reducing swelling and pain, and aiding in the management of fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health purposes.
